chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6594 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel states that petition may be disposed of and fate of the provisional release be subject to outcome of related SCRA 453 of 2016. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
